title: Close CRM vs HubSpot
description: Should you choose Close CRM or HubSpot? We put both crm & sales platforms through a comprehensive feature comparison to help you decide which one fits your team best.
verdict: HubSpot emerges as the winner in this comparison based on overall feature depth, user satisfaction ratings, and value for money in the CRM & Sales category. While both platforms are strong contenders, HubSpot offers the better balance of features, pricing, and user experience for most use cases.

faqs.question: Which is better for small teams, Close CRM or HubSpot?
faqs.answer: For small teams, the choice often comes down to ease of setup and pricing. Close CRM tends to be more intuitive for new users, while HubSpot offers more advanced features that smaller teams may not need immediately. Consider your team's technical comfort level and growth plans.

faqs.question: Can Close CRM and HubSpot be integrated?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer API access and integration capabilities, making it possible to use them together if needed. However, most teams find it more efficient to standardize on one platform to avoid data duplication and workflow fragmentation.
